notes: v0.14.6 — Equipped SHARD skin now actually renders everywhere the ship/avatar shows up: top profile bar avatar, PROFILE dropdown card, HOME featured ship card (with chromatic ghost layers), character showcase snippet, and the in-game player ship in player.gd. Texture rotates with aim during gameplay; pulse-breathing scale and invuln blink preserved. Skill visual layers (halo, body underlay, energy ring, HP bar, trail, buff rings) still draw on top of the texture so dash/phase mods read correctly. Equip from CLASS page → visible everywhere next frame. Windows only.
